description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a long, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a point. The blade is bordered with a gold or brass-colored edge, while the central portion is a darker metallic shade, suggesting a steel or iron core. The crossguard is ornate, featuring symmetrical, angular extensions and a circular central motif, all in the same gold tone. The handle is straight and slender, matching the blade's dark color, and ends in a pointed pommel. The overall design is reminiscent of fantasy or ceremonial swords, with a focus on visual elegance and symmetry.
description: A stylized, double-edged sword with a gold-edged blade, ornate crossguard, and a dark, slender handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade, ornate crossguard, and straight handle with gold and dark metallic colors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the sword's thin profile and the layered construction of the crossguard.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the symmetrical blade and crossguard details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the sword's thinness and the geometric crossguard structure.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark, slender, no visible grip texture, pointed pommel
attribute_ornamentation: geometric gold crossguard and blade edging
